prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约12749名（2021理科）→13150名（2022理科）→16645名（2024物理类）→19214名（2025物理类），整体呈持续后移趋势，近 两年累计后移约6069名，后移速度明显加快；2025年基准位次约19214名；该校在贵州省理科/物理类招生计划持续扩增：2021年49人→2022年51人→2024年64人→2 025年69人→2026年79人，2026年较2025年扩招10人（增幅约14.5%），计划人数持续增加，考生竞争面扩大，位次数字有增大压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流 建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第76名，近年排名稳定在76–77名区间，属于中上水平行业特色型211，办学实力与品牌认知度较为稳固；2026年高考周期 声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理类事件，无重大正面或负面舆情冲击；抖音热度未进入全国高校前100名，短视频平台曝光度一般，报考关注度无明显异常升温或降温信 号；历史投档异常记录中未见该校出现断档或暴跌情况；该校以矿业与安全为特色，安全科学与工程为A+学科（全国顶尖），测绘科学与技术为A-学科；招生专 业中安全科学与工程类、测绘类、采矿工程、矿物加工工程等均对应上述优势学科，对相关方向考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电 子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，该校上述专业招生名额有限（各3人），对整体位次拉动作用有限；土木建筑类专业社会热度明显劝退，该校土木工程2025年位次已跌 至19323名，成为最低分专业；贵州省2026年高考总人数约299000人，按近年物理类占比约69%估算，物理类考生约206310人，较2025年物理类207171人微减约0.4%，竞争压力略有 缓解；学校位于北京市，对贵州省考生属于跨省报考，无本省招生倾斜；该校在贵州招生计划持续扩增，从2021年49人增 至2026年79人，反映出对贵州生源的重视程度提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划较2025年扩招约14.5%（竞争加剧，位次数字增大）以及贵州 省物理类考生总数微减约0.4%（竞争略有缓解，位次数字减小）三方面因素，扩招效应占主导，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年19214名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约20805 名，区间20305–21305名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 计算机科学与技术
- 人工智能
- 智能制造工程
- 新能源科学与工程
- 机械类（机械工程、机器人工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 智能采矿工程
- 工程力学
- 测绘类（测绘工程、遥感科学与技术）
- 智能建造
- 化学工程与工艺
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 安全科学与工程类（安全工程、消防工程、应急技术与管理）
- 工商管理类（工商管理、会计学、大数据管理与应用）
- 采矿工程
- 地质类（地质工程、资源勘查工程）
- 矿物加工工程
- 城市地下空间工程
- 土木工程
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间20305–21305名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如20305名以内）可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化、计 算机科学与技术等热门一档专业；位次接近区间上限（21305名附近）应以三档中的安全科学与工程类（A+）、采矿工程（A+）等王牌专业保底，同时争取二档中的数学类、智能 采矿工程等。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 12,749 (2021 Science) → 13,150 (2022 Science) → 16,645 (2024 Physics Category) → 19,214 (2025 Physics Category), showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6,069 places in the last two years and a significantly accelerated pace; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 19,214; the university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Guizhou Province has been continuously expanding: 49 in 2021 → 51 in 2022 → 64 in 2024 → 69 in 2025 → 79 in 2026, with an increase of 10 students in 2026 compared to 2025 (an increase of about 14.5%), the planned number continues to increase, expanding the competition pool for candidates, putting upward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 76th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 76–77 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level industry-specific 211, with relatively solid办学 strength and brand recognition; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, mainly involving university management incidents, with no major positive or negative public opinion impact; Douyin popularity did not enter the top 100 national universities, with general exposure on short video platforms, and no abnormal surge or decline in application attention; no historical admission anomalies such as gaps or sharp drops were found for this university; the university is characterized by mining and safety, with Safety Science and Engineering as an A+ discipline (top in the country), and Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology as an A- discipline; the enrollment majors include Safety Science and Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, Mining Engineering, Mineral Processing Engineering, etc., all corresponding to the above advantageous disciplines, providing stable attraction for candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly recommended due to social popularity, but the university has limited enrollment quotas for these majors (3 each), with limited impact on overall rankings; Civil Engineering and Architecture majors are significantly discouraged by social sentiment, and the university's Civil Engineering ranking in 2025 has dropped to 19,323, becoming the lowest-scoring major; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Guizhou Province is about 299,000, with an estimated Physics Category proportion of about 69% in recent years, resulting in about 206,310 Physics Category candidates, a slight decrease of about 0.4% compared to 207,171 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure; the university is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application for Guizhou candidates, with no provincial admission preference; the university's enrollment plan in Guizhou has been continuously expanding, from 49 in 2021 to 79 in 2026, reflecting an increased emphasis on Guizhou students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the enrollment plan expansion of about 14.5% in 2026 compared to 2025 (increased competition, ranking numbers increase), and the slight decrease of about 0.4% in the total number of Physics Category candidates in Guizhou Province (slightly eased competition, ranking numbers decrease), the expansion effect dominates; it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 19,214; the predicted minimum ranking is about 20,805, with a range of 20,305–21,305.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 20,305–21,305, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 20,305) can focus on reaching for popular Tier 1 majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science and Technology; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 21,305) should use Tier 3 majors like Safety Science and Engineering (A+), Mining Engineering (A+) as safety options, while also aiming for Tier 2 majors such as Mathematics Category, Intelligent Mining Engineering.
